name: Navigate by Chapters
fullName: Read PDF in Palace Bookshelf on IOS: Navigate by Chapters
statusMessage: 'Deep into Pharo' book with specific action button is not present on catalog books screen
statusTrace:
java.lang.AssertionError: 'Deep into Pharo' book with specific action button is not present on catalog books screen
	at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:89)
	at org.junit.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:42)
	at stepdefinitions.CatalogBooksSteps.isBookPresent(CatalogBooksSteps.java:92)
	at ✽.EBOOK book with READ action button and 'bookInfo' bookInfo is present on catalog books screen(file:///home/runner/work/mobile-integration-tests/mobile-integration-tests/src/test/java/features/PdfPalaceIos.feature:14)

testStage.statusMessage: 'Deep into Pharo' book with specific action button is not present on catalog books screen
testStage.statusTrace:
java.lang.AssertionError: 'Deep into Pharo' book with specific action button is not present on catalog books screen
	at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:89)
	at org.junit.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:42)
	at stepdefinitions.CatalogBooksSteps.isBookPresent(CatalogBooksSteps.java:92)
	at ✽.EBOOK book with READ action button and 'bookInfo' bookInfo is present on catalog books screen(file:///home/runner/work/mobile-integration-tests/mobile-integration-tests/src/test/java/features/PdfPalaceIos.feature:14)

steps.name: Then  Add library screen is opened
When  Add library "Palace Bookshelf" on Add library screen
Then  Account "Palace Bookshelf" is present on Accounts screen
And  Search for 'Deep into Pharo' and save bookName as 'bookNameInfo'
And  Click GET action button on EBOOK book with 'bookNameInfo' bookName on catalog books screen and save book as 'bookInfo'
Then  EBOOK book with READ action button and 'bookInfo' bookInfo is present on catalog books screen
steps.statusMessage: 'Deep into Pharo' book with specific action button is not present on catalog books screen
steps.statusTrace:
java.lang.AssertionError: 'Deep into Pharo' book with specific action button is not present on catalog books screen
	at org.junit.Assert.fail(Assert.java:89)
	at org.junit.Assert.assertTrue(Assert.java:42)
	at stepdefinitions.CatalogBooksSteps.isBookPresent(CatalogBooksSteps.java:92)
	at ✽.EBOOK book with READ action button and 'bookInfo' bookInfo is present on catalog books screen(file:///home/runner/work/mobile-integration-tests/mobile-integration-tests/src/test/java/features/PdfPalaceIos.feature:14)

steps.name: When  Open EBOOK book with READ action button and 'bookNameInfo' bookName on catalog books screen and save book as 'bookInfo'
And  Click READ action button on book details screen
Then  Reader pdf screen is opened
When  Open table of contents on pdf reader screen
And  Open text chapter content on pdf toc screen
And  Open random chapter and save the number as 'pageNumberInfo' on pdf toc screen
Then  Page number is equal to 'pageNumberInfo' on pdf reader screen
